A.text: The range of wind speeds is smaller in the central United States than along the East Coast.

B.text: Wind speeds are higher along the West Coast than in the central United States.

C.text: The range of wind speeds is larger in the central United States than along the West Coast.

D.text: Wind speeds are approximately equal along the East and West Coasts.

parsed.answer_value: The range of wind speeds is larger in the central United States than along the West Coast.
parsed.rationale: The map shows a wider variety of wind speeds in the central United States, indicated by the different shades of gray, compared to the more uniform shading along the West Coast.
